titleStmt.title: SII 5.1402: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1402. (A.R. No. 39 of 1897). ON THE GOPURA IN FRONT OF THE TOPPUL-PILLAIYAR TEMPLE AT TANJORE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirappiṟatāpa śrīviraacyutatevarāyama hārā yar pṛthuviraājyam pa ṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śakābda m
1000 4 100 5 10 4 Itaṉmel cellaāniṉṟa naṉtana samvatsara ttu kaṟkaṭakanāyattu pūrvapakṣa ttu saptami yūm comavāramum peṟṟa Astanakṣatra ttu nāḷ vācal mallappanā
yakkar Ayyaṉ puttiṟaṉa ciṉṉappanāyakkar Ayyaṉ Avarkaḷukku dharmma mākaveṇum Eṉṟu koṉappanāyakkar puttiṟaṉ tāttappanāyakkar tañcāūr piḷḷaiyār Aḷa
keśvara piḷḷaiyārāṉa toppāraṅkaṭṭiya piḷḷaiyārkkum tiruppaṇiperumāḷ nayiṉārkkum tiruppaṇikku kuṭutta dharmmaśāsana paṭṭayam kuṭuttapaṭi Iṉṉāyaṉāṟ
ku tiruppaṇiyārapuṟam tevatāṉamāka cettu kuṭutta coḻamaṇṭalam tiruccilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi tañcāvūrcirmai kāveriāṟṟukku tenkarai nitya viṉoda vaḷanāṭṭu milaṭṭūrpaṟṟu caṅkama
rāyaṉpeṭṭai kiṟāmam tirttappanāyakkar ciṉṉappanāyakkar Ayyaṉ Avarkaḷukku puṇṇiyamākaveṇum Eṉṟu cettukuṭutta nañcai puñcai nattam ceytalai tiṭar nāṟpāṅkellaiyum Uṭpaṭṭa nilam m 6- lim nattanilam
veli Āka nilam 7- likku nāḷatuvaraiyum pakunta deva[ myānnyam caruvamānnya m] bhaṭṭavṛ tti niṅkalāka nilattil vāṉpayir Uṭpaṭa ṉṟu mutal nellu mutalukku kūṭṭum vaṟkamceta koṭṭu kuṭuttiṭalai cāra� taḷavā
oḻukkurumuṭṭam kāveri kallaṇai kāṭuveṭṭu nallerutu naṟpacu Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalātāyamum Uṭpaṭa kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu sapta miyum comavāramum peṟṟa nāḷ vācal mallappanāyakar Ayyaṉ pūṟ
ṟiṟaṉ ciṉṉappanāyakkar Avarkaḷum taṉmam Ākaveṇum Eṉṟu koṉappanāyakkar puttiṟaṉ tāttappanāyakka(r) revvi toppāramkaṭṭiya piḷḷaiyāṟku taṉmamāka tiruppaṇikku cettukuṭuttapaṭiyā
le Inta taṉmattukku yiyātāmoruttar Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaiy karaiyil kārāmpacu koṉṟa pāvattileyum taṉ mātā pitāvai yum taṉ kaiyyāle koṉṟa pāvattile
yum pokakkaṭavārākavum
Digital edition of SII 5.1402 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
